header_14.raw_response: In my experience, competition can serve both motivating and stressful purposes. On the other hand, competition can also be extremely stressful, especially in high-pressure environments or when the stakes are very high. This stress can lead to burnout, anxiety, and a negative impact on mental health. Given my background and values, I believe competition falls somewhere in the middle of the spectrum, where it can be both motivating and stressful depending on the context and how it is managed.
